column2: My job responsibilities are clearly defined.
column3: My performance expectations are clearly defined and measurable.
column4: I know who has final decision-making authority on key tasks within my team.
column5: The boundaries between my responsibilities and others’ responsibilities are clearly defined.
column6: My manager communicates role expectations clearly and consistently.
column7: I understand how my role contributes to my team’s objectives.
column8: When multiple tasks compete for attention, I know which priorities come first.
column9: Standard processes for completing key tasks are clearly defined.
column10: Changes to my role are communicated in a timely manner.
column11: Expectations between my team and other teams are clearly defined.
column12: I have a clear understanding of how AI will impact my role or function.
column13: I actively use AI tools to improve my day-to-day work efficiency.
column14: I feel equipped with the skills required to work effectively alongside AI tools.
column15: The organization provides sufficient guidance or support for adapting to AI-driven changes.
column16: Uncertainty related to AI-driven changes increases my likelihood of considering opportunities outside the organization.
column17: Which department do you belong to?
column18: Which team or function are you part of? (Optional – short answer or dropdown)
column19: Who is your immediate reporting manager?
column20: What is your current role level?
column21: How long have you been with the organization?
